# Native Module

> Part of [refinex-notes](../AGENTS.md).

## Ownership

This module owns: the Tauri application crate, desktop window/runtime configuration, IPC command boundaries, and the Rust-side domains for auth, Git, AI, Markdown, search, watcher, and shared state.

This module does NOT own: React rendering, Tailwind styling, Zustand client state, or browser-only interaction patterns implemented under `src/`.

## Key Patterns

- `src-tauri/src/commands/` is the IPC boundary; request/response entry points should live there before delegating into domain modules.
- Domain concerns are already split into `src-tauri/src/{ai,git,markdown,search}` plus shared modules such as `state.rs`, `db.rs`, and `watcher.rs`.
- `src-tauri/src/lib.rs` is the runtime entry that wires the Tauri builder; keep bootstrap and global registration there rather than scattering startup code.
- Several Rust files are still placeholders, so native work should extend the existing domain directories instead of creating duplicate engines elsewhere.

## Testing

- Test location: inline unit tests in `src-tauri/src/**/*.rs` (currently none)
- Run tests: `cargo test --manifest-path src-tauri/Cargo.toml`
- Test style: The current baseline is compile-focused and runs 0 tests; add Rust unit/integration tests alongside new native behavior

## Dependencies

- Depends on: `src-tauri/Cargo.toml`, `src-tauri/src/commands/`, `src-tauri/src/{ai,git,markdown,search}`
- Depended on by: the frontend service layer and Tauri runtime defined at the repo root
